summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of GetLocal V2 Marketplace Expansion - All Phase 1-5 features tested and verified working
passed_tests: POST /nextapi/upload-audio returns 201 with candidateId
Candidate schema has trust_score=100, address, will_relocate fields
Job schema has perks (array), training_provided (boolean), employer_location
Support ticket requires_call defaults to false
/join page mode toggle between Voice and Manual working
Language metadata saved correctly for ml, bn, ta languages
/jobs page has Play Audio button and commute tag working
/post-job saves job with all new fields (perks, training, employer_location)
Wallet/Unlock deducts 10 credits and reveals phone number
WhatsApp button has wa.me link with encoded message
Report No-Show deducts 10 from trust_score correctly
Chat widget creates ticket with requires_call=true
/admin/support shows tickets with call buttons
Call User button has tel: href format
Trust score badges (100%) displayed correctly
Match scores and distance calculations working
Manual form submission with address and relocation fields
Voice interview mock transcription for 9 languages
Audio job descriptions with speechSynthesis working
Hyperlocal commute tags displaying correctly
